warm_pipeline_resolution.note: FINAL CLOSE DAY for leads 1/3/22. 21-day IMAP gap. After today's final close attempts, these leads are either CONVERTED (if they reply) or LOST_NO_RESPONSE. This is the last email action before the campaign enters full dormancy pending Batch 5.

linkedin_post_close_option.rule: If leads 1/3/22 receive their final close email today and do not reply within 7 days: LinkedIn nurture is permissible as a soft last-ditch attempt. Generate notes for these three leads on 2026-05-02 (7 days after today's final close) IF and ONLY IF the email conversation is definitively closed with no reply.
linkedin_post_close_option.note_type: generic — do not reference the email outreach. Treat as fresh LinkedIn connection.
linkedin_post_close_option.caveat: This is a last-resort only. If any of these three leads reply to the email close — even to decline — LinkedIn is permanently closed for that lead.

batch_1_4_summary.root_cause: HANDS execution latency — LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) missed on every batch of candidates across all 28 campaign days
batch_1_4_summary.channel_verdict: Architecturally ready. Operationally unexecuted. The BRAIN intelligence layer functioned correctly; the HANDS execution layer did not execute.

batch_5_revised_protocol.mandatory_same_session_rule: HANDS must search, check posts, and send note in ONE SESSION on Day 3, 4, 5, or 6. Do not split across days.
batch_5_revised_protocol.brain_flagging: BRAIN will mark LinkedIn send days with MANDATORY flag in daily_signals.json to increase execution priority.
batch_5_revised_protocol.profiles_json_requirement: HANDS must write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after each search session — whether or not a note was sent. BRAIN needs this to track execution.
batch_5_revised_protocol.target_turnaround: Within 2 hours of BRAIN run on Day 3-6. Maximum: same calendar day.
batch_5_revised_protocol.fallback_escalation: If HANDS cannot execute within the window: log in CHANGELOG.md with reason. Do not skip silently — the gap will compound.

hands_priority_order_today: 1. FULL IMAP SWEEP — 21-day gap. Check ALL leads including warm pipeline (1/3/22) and all completed sequences. Silent replies are a real risk across the entire cohort.
2. Send final closes for leads 3 (Claire), 22 (Rob), 1 (Tom) before 10:00 if IMAP reveals no reply — last opportunity before LOST_NO_RESPONSE.
3. Confirm fu_046-049 send status in CHANGELOG.md. If any not sent: send today (Day 15 — last acceptable).
4. Confirm fu_036-045 send status in CHANGELOG.md. If any not sent: send today (borderline Day 15-16 — still send).
5. Log campaign milestone in CHANGELOG.md after all confirms complete.
6. Batch 5 Ryedale scrape — if not completed by now: THIS IS THE SINGLE HIGHEST PRIORITY remaining action. Every day of delay extends the campaign gap.
7. Blocked leads 49/51/53/54 — unblocking actions: Companies House (49), phone call (51), Rightmove (53), info@ (54). After milestone work completes.
8. Write linkedin_profiles.json for ANY LinkedIn searches conducted in the past 8 BRAIN runs — even retrospectively, for campaign records.
